sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75181" key="o(rmodoth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁρμοδοτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75181.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">harbour-giver,</tr_> of Priapus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
